---
title: "Hierarchical Tennis Model 2 v1"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-tools: true
    code-line-numbers: true
    number-sections: true
    mainfont: Georgia, serif
editor: source
---

```{r}
if (!require(tidybayes)) {
    install.packages("tidybayes")
    library(tidybayes)
}

if (!require(tidyr)) {
    install.packages("tidyr")
    library(tidyr)
}

if (!require(brms)) {
    install.packages("brms")
    library(brms)
}

if(!require(ggplot2)) {
  install.packages("ggplot2")
  library(ggplot2)
}

if(!require(reliabilitydiag)) {
  install.packages("reliabilitydiag")
  library(reliabilitydiag)
}


if (!require(metadat)) {
  install.packages("metadat")
  library(metadat)
}

if(!require(cmdstanr)){
    install.packages("cmdstanr", repos = c("https://mc-stan.org/r-packages/", getOption("repos")))
    library(cmdstanr)
}
cmdstan_installed <- function(){
  res <- try(out <- cmdstanr::cmdstan_path(), silent = TRUE)
  !inherits(res, "try-error")
}
if(!cmdstan_installed()){
    install_cmdstan()
}
```

```{r}
data <- read.csv("master-sub.csv")

head(data)
```

```{r}
df <- data[c("ServerWon", "BreakPoint", "Tiebreaker", "PointServer", "player1id", "player2id")]

df$ServerID <- ifelse(df$PointServer == 2,
                      df$player2id,
                      df$player1id)

str(df$ServerWon)
str(df$BreakPoint)
str(df$Tiebreaker)
str(df$ServerID)
```

```{r}
fit_hier <- brm(
  formula = ServerWon ~ BreakPoint + Tiebreaker +
            (1 + BreakPoint + Tiebreaker | ServerID),
  data    = df,
  family  = bernoulli(link = "logit"),
  prior   = c(
    # standard intercept and slope
    prior(normal(0, 2^2), class = "Intercept"),
    prior(normal(0, 1^2),   class = "b"),
    # hierarchical variation
    prior(normal(0, 1),   class = "sd", group = "ServerID"),
    # correlation between random effects
    prior(lkj(2),         class = "cor", group = "ServerID")
  ),
  chains  = 4,
  cores   = 4,
  iter    = 2000
)
```

```{r}

summary(fit_hier)
```

```{r}
newdata <- data.frame(
  Tiebreaker = 0,
  BreakPoint = 1,
  ServerID = 1496
)

ppd_break <- posterior_epred(
  fit_hier,
  newdata = newdata
  )

ppd_reg <- posterior_epred(
  fit_hier,
  newdata = df[df$ServerID == 1496,][sample(1136, 1),]
)

ppd_tie <- posterior_epred(
  fit_hier,
  newdata = data.frame(
    Tiebreaker = 1,
    BreakPoint = 0,
    ServerID = 1496
  )
)

preds <- data.frame(
  p_reg = as.vector(ppd_reg),
  p_break = as.vector(ppd_break),
  p_tie = as.vector(ppd_tie)
)
```

```{r}
p <- ggplot(preds) + 
  geom_density(
    aes(p_reg, colour = 'Any point')
  ) + geom_density(
    aes(p_break, colour = 'Breakpoint')
  ) + geom_density(
    aes(p_tie, colour = 'Tiebreak')
  ) +
  xlab('Win probability') +
  ylab('Density')
p
```
